scene.message: Nanjo: Where did the other{nl} club rooms go?{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: There doesn't seem to{nl} be anything useful here.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: Ice everywhere you look.{waitkey}It's just cold — I can't call{nl} it beautiful.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: Where could the other{nl} club members be?{waitkey}{ret}
